message:
feat(egraph,conformance): shape-parametric chain optimizer, expanded JVP/VJP edge-case tests

Add a pre-pass to the e-graph optimizer that eliminates redundant
shape-parametric operation chains before the egg rewrite phase:
- Identity transpose elision (permutation == identity)
- Inverse transpose pair cancellation (T(perm) . T(perm^-1) => id)
- ExpandDims/Squeeze and Squeeze/ExpandDims cancellation on same axis
- Variable alias tracking with use-count gating for safe removal

Expand JVP numerical verification with edge-case tests for QR on
ill-conditioned rectangular matrices, SVD with near-zero singular
values, Eigh on well-conditioned 3x3, TriangularSolve near-singular
diagonal, and Exp/Log at extreme inputs. Reformat VJP test call sites
for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
